title: [MTR/WPP] dutch pids pack
description: we made the dutch ns darkmode works with mtr and world pids
body:
![thank you for the 1000 downloads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e1ee8eccbe8616d24a789e3592a3d9d8213e9ce.jpeg)Bring the charm of the Netherlands into your Minecraft worlds with the Dutch Pids Pack! This resource pack is carefully designed to enhance the experience of train travel and world-building with a distinct Dutch flair. Fully compatible with MTR 4.0 and the World Pids Pack, it ensures smooth integration with your favorite train mods and worlds.

Whether you’re recreating bustling Dutch train stations, serene countryside landscapes, or modern cityscapes, this pack adds authentic Dutch textures, signs, and visuals to make your gameplay feel more immersive. Designed for Minecraft versions 1.20.1 and 1.20.4, it works seamlessly without conflicts.

Ideal for players who love trains, urban planning, or simply want to bring a touch of the Netherlands to their Minecraft adventure. Download the Dutch Pids Pack today and transform your worlds into a true Dutch experience!


Compatible Mods:

MTR 4.0 (Minecraft Transit Railway) – required for train-related textures
Other Requirements:

Ensure you have the correct versions of the above mods installed
